dataList.name: Let the Blood Festival Flow
dataList.desc: The battle proceeds to the next phase after all the Clay Dolls are defeated

dataList.name: Let the Fire Festival Ignite
dataList.desc: If both Arms are destroyed or the main body’s ХП is brought to 70%, the battle proceeds to the next phase

dataList.name: Frenzy
dataList.desc: During phase 3, наносит 7 [Combustion] on all enemies every turn

dataList.name: Let the Star Festival Fall
dataList.desc: When the Core ХП is brought to 25% or lower, the battle proceeds to the next phase

dataList.name: Idolatry
dataList.desc:
Does not die at 0 ХП; instead, remains on the stage as an immobile and untargetable unit.
Suppressed when the Doomsday Calendar is suppressed

dataList.name: Returning Past
dataList.desc: At 50+ [AccumulatedPast], and if Core ХП is at 80%-, the Core heals 200 ХП by consuming 50 [AccumulatedPast] at Turn End

dataList.name: Misplaced Past
dataList.desc:
When the Body is broken, consume all [AccumulatedPast]
When the Body is broken, starting на следующий ход, all Attack Types and Affinities become Ineffective(0.5) for the rest of the Encounter

dataList.name: Broken Exhaust Port
dataList.desc:
When Steam Blaster is broken, completely lose  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> on all parts
Once Steam Blaster is broken, every time this unit gains  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color>, gain [Vulnerable] за каждые  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> gained
Once Steam Blaster is broken, lose 1  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> On Use of an Attack Skill

dataList.name: Leaking Steam
dataList.desc: When Steam Blaster is hit, lose 1  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color> and 1 счётчика  <sprite name="Breath"><color=#f8c200><u><link="Breath"><noparse>Кумара</noparse></link></u></color>

dataList.name: Metronome
dataList.desc:
If [AccumulatedPast] is an odd number, gain 3 [Vulnerable] and [AttackDmgUp]
If it is an even number, gain 3 [Protection] and [AttackDmgDown]

dataList.name: Vigorous Volaille
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Хилит 5 ХП за каждые Raw Chicken on the field

dataList.name: Gloomy Gallus
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Deal 5 IQ урона to all enemies за каждые Raw Chicken on the field

dataList.name: Fragile Fowl
dataList.desc: When a Part breaks, gain 1 [Vulnerable] every turn за каждые Raw Chicken that died before that Part was broken

dataList.name: Powerful Poussin
dataList.desc: If the Part isn’t broken, gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] every turn за каждые surviving Raw Chicken

dataList.name: Bongy Chicken Struts
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Deal 3 IQ урона to a random enemy

dataList.name: Bongy Chicken Beefs Up
dataList.desc: Конец хода: Apply 2 [AttackDmgUp] and 2 [Protection] to all allies на следующий ход, including this unit

dataList.name: Blood Sac
dataList.desc:
Если у этого юнита есть [BloodPocket]:
- The Body's Wrath Resist. -50%
- The Body's Gloom Resist. +50%

dataList.name: Fluid Sac
dataList.desc: Если у этого юнита есть [WaterPocket], хилит its Core by (стаков x 20)

dataList.name: Ruptured Blood Sac
dataList.desc: Once the Body is broken, on Clash Win, activate the enemy's <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> once and reduce счётчика <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> by 1

dataList.name: Splash Around
dataList.desc:
Apply 1 [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror] on the target that Clashed against this unit's Skill using a Skill that has the same Attack Type as this unit's (once per Skill, 3 times per turn)
- If it was a Blunt Skill, apply 2 [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror] instead

dataList.name: Fluid Sac
dataList.desc: Если у этого юнита есть [WaterPocket], хилит its Core by (стаков x 30)

dataList.name: Ruptured Blood Sac
dataList.desc: Once the Body is broken, on Clash Win, activate the enemy's <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> twice and reduce счётчика <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> by 2

dataList.name: Blood Sac
dataList.desc:
Если у этого юнита есть [BloodPocket]:
- The Body's Wrath Resist. -35%
- The Body's Gloom Resist. +35%

dataList.name: Fluid Sac
dataList.desc: Если у этого юнита есть [WaterPocket], хилит its Core by (стаков x 35)

dataList.name: Ruptured Blood Sac
dataList.desc: Once the Body is broken, on Clash Win, activate the enemy's <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> thrice and reduce счётчика <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> by 3

dataList.name: SplishSplashSplish
dataList.desc:
If target does not have [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror], gain the following effects:
- Deal +80% урона
- On Hit using a Skill's final Coin, trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's счётчика [Vibration] by 1

If target has [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror], gain the following effects:
- Deal -50% урона
- Take +10% урона за каждые [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror] стаков на цели (макс. 100%)

If no one has [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror], gain the following effects:
- On Hit using a Skill, наносит 5 <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color>
- On Hit using a Skill's final Coin, activate <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> once; then, reduce target's счётчика <sprite name="Laceration"><color=#e30000><u><link="Laceration"><noparse>Кетчупа</noparse></link></u></color> by 1
